Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the POWL Model: Activities: R A E P N C. Structure: loop = OperatorPOWL LOOP children E P. xor = OperatorPOWL XOR children N skip. root = StrictPartialOrder nodes R A loop xor C. Edges: R A, A loop, loop xor, A C. Missing xor C.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Task 1 Identify Anomalies: Anomaly 1 Loop E and P repeat. Anomaly 2 XOR allows skip N. Anomaly 3 Edge A C allows premature closing skipping loop xor. Anomaly 4 Missing xor C allows out of sequence.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Task 2 Generate Hypotheses: Why Loop Complex claims multiple evaluations. Why Skip Notification Internal fraud claims. Why Premature Closing Cancelled claims or system bug. Why Partial Order Flexibility too loose.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Task 3 Propose SQL Queries: Schema claims claim_events. Query 1 Premature Closing C exists but no E or P. Query 2 Multiple P count P >1. Query 3 Skipped N C exists no N. Query 4 Out of sequence C timestamp before E.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction on POWL semantics StrictPartialOrder C after A not after xor loop confirms premature anomaly. Self Correction on Loop children E P means E P repeats.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Refining the SQL Use CTEs subqueries. Review Formatting Structure response Anomalies Hypotheses Queries. Final Polish Professional tone SQL valid connect anomaly to query.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Review and Formatting Self Correction during drafting Confirm A C no xor C. Plan solid Draft response 1 Anomalies 2 Hypotheses 3 SQL.
